name: hackit-mvp
description: Hackit MVP monorepo — Flutter web frontend + Node.js backend

scripts.quality:local: cd backend && npm test -- test/observability.test.js && cd ../frontend_flutter && flutter test test/screens/salons_screen_recommended_channel_test.dart test/screens/artifact_review_screen_test.dart test/screens/room_tasks_screen_test.dart
scripts.quality:local:strict: npm run lint && npm run quality:local
scripts.quality:local:fast: cd backend && npm test -- test/observability.test.js && cd ../frontend_flutter && flutter test test/screens/salons_screen_recommended_channel_test.dart
